title: Part 5 – Phrases à compléter : santé
instructions: Choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui complète correctement chaque phrase.

questions.sentence: Employees who feel unwell ____ stay home to avoid spreading illness.
The clinic is open ____ weekdays from eight to six.
Patients ____ to arrive fifteen minutes before their appointment.
She has been feeling unwell ____ Monday.
questions.explanation: "since" + point de départ précis dans le temps ("Monday").

questions.sentence: It is important to wash your hands ____ eating.
